id.description: Model id as the vendor enumerates it.

label.description: Human-readable model label; null when the enumeration source has none.

context_window.description: Context window in tokens; null when the enumeration source does not report it.

items.description: One enumerable model offered by a harness, limited to fields a real enumeration source can honestly populate.

models.description: Enumerable models; empty when the harness has no model truth source.

source.description: Provenance of the list: api (a live vendor enumeration), manifest (the manifest's known-good hint set), or none (no model truth source; explicit models are refused).

verifiedAgainst.description: Vendor CLI version the manifest hints were last verified against; null for api/none sources.

ControlHarnessModelsResponse.description: Models enumerable for one harness, with honest provenance.
